The '''Glite-Ven hostilities''' were a conflict fought in the [[Glite-Ven system/Legends|Glite-Ven system]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]] had acquired the modified [[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series supervisor droid]] [[EV-4D9]] during the hostilities.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Glite-Ven hostilities were first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] supplement written by [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />
